Package dontlookback

Class LightManager

java.lang.Object
dontlookback.LightManager
public class LightManager extends Object
Light Management System for Don't Look Back Manages all light sources in the game world and determines whether positions are protected from the grue. Handles dynamic lighting, light source lifecycle, and environmental lighting effects. Features: - Global light source registry - Position protection calculation - Environmental lighting simulation - Light flickering and failure events - Power management systems - Atmospheric lighting effects
Version:
1.0
Author:
DLB Team

  • Method Details

    • addLightSource

      public boolean addLightSource(LightSource lightSource)
      Add a light source to the world
      Parameters:
      lightSource - Light source to add
      Returns:
      true if successfully added

    • removeLightSource

      public boolean removeLightSource(LightSource lightSource)
      Remove a light source from the world
      Parameters:
      lightSource - Light source to remove
      Returns:
      true if successfully queued for removal

    • isPositionProtected

      public boolean isPositionProtected(float[] position)
      Check if a position is protected from the grue by any light source
      Parameters:
      position - Position to check [x, y, z]
      Returns:
      true if position is safe from grue

    • getLightLevelAtPosition

      public float getLightLevelAtPosition(float[] position)
      Get the combined light level at a position
      Parameters:
      position - Position to check [x, y, z]
      Returns:
      Light level from 0.0 (dark) to 1.0+ (very bright)

    • getNearestLightSource

      public LightSource getNearestLightSource(float[] position)
      Find the nearest light source to a position
      Parameters:
      position - Position to check [x, y, z]
      Returns:
      Nearest light source, or null if none found

    • getLightSourcesInRadius

      public List<LightSource> getLightSourcesInRadius(float[] position, float radius)
      Get all light sources within a radius of a position
      Parameters:
      position - Center position [x, y, z]
      radius - Search radius
      Returns:
      List of light sources within radius

    • update

      public void update(float deltaTime)
      Update all light sources and environmental effects
      Parameters:
      deltaTime - Time since last update in seconds

    • getActiveLights

      public List<LightSource> getActiveLights()
      Get all active light sources
      Returns:
      Immutable list of active lights

    • getPlayerLights

      public List<LightSource> getPlayerLights()
      Get player-owned light sources
      Returns:
      List of portable light sources

    • getEnvironmentalLights

      public List<LightSource> getEnvironmentalLights()
      Get environmental light sources
      Returns:
      List of fixed light sources

    • getGlobalLightLevel

      public float getGlobalLightLevel()
      Get global light level
      Returns:
      Current global light level (0.0 to 1.0)

    • isPowerAvailable

      public boolean isPowerAvailable()
      Check if power is available for electrical devices
      Returns:
      true if power is available

    • setPowerAvailable

      public void setPowerAvailable(boolean available)
      Set power availability
      Parameters:
      available - Whether power should be available

    • setFlickeringEnabled

      public void setFlickeringEnabled(boolean enabled)
      Enable/disable light flickering effects
      Parameters:
      enabled - Whether flickering should occur

      public void setPowerFailuresEnabled(boolean enabled)
      Enable/disable power failure events
      Parameters:
      enabled - Whether power failures should occur

    • setLightFailureChance

      public void setLightFailureChance(float chance)
      Set the chance of random light failures
      Parameters:
      chance - Failure chance per frame (0.0 to 1.0)

Don't Look Back - Horror Survival Game Engine

Built with Java 17, LWJGL 3.3.4, JBox2D | GitHub Repository | Report Issues
